import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  let n = tokens.len()
  if n == 0
    print("top==0")
    Ok(())
  else
    mut keys: List<String> = []
    mut counts: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let tok = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        t
      when None
        ""
      end
      mut found = false
      mut j = 0
      while j < keys.len()
        let key = match keys.get(j)
        when Some(k)
          k
        when None
          ""
        end
        if key == tok
          let old = match counts.get(j)
          when Some(c)
            c
          when None
            0
          end
          mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
          mut k2 = 0
          while k2 < counts.len()
            let v = match counts.get(k2)
            when Some(c)
              c
            when None
              0
            end
            if k2 == j
              new_counts = list.push(new_counts, old + 1)
            else
              new_counts = list.push(new_counts, v)
            end
            k2 = k2 + 1
          end
          counts = new_counts
          found = true
          j = keys.len()
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
      if not found
        keys = list.push(keys, tok)
        counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut best_tok = match keys.get(0)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    mut best_count = match counts.get(0)
    when Some(c)
      c
    when None
      0
    end
    mut m = 1
    while m < keys.len()
      let c = match counts.get(m)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if c > best_count
        best_count = c
        best_tok = match keys.get(m)
        when Some(t)
          t
        when None
          ""
        end
      end
      m = m + 1
    end
    print("top=#{best_tok}=#{best_count}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
